{{Quote|Oh, and stop by my bunk when you're off duty, will you? Another "surprise" inspection tomorrow; my quarters need cleaning.|Creeve to Troomis|<ref name="RASB" />}}
'''Creeve''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Creeve was an [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was posted to a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where the locals were poor and willing to do anything for an extra [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]], although he found the women to be a little too spirited for his tastes. Creeve was unaware that one of the [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] on the base, [[Troomis]], was secretly a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. [[Troomis' sister]] had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] after an altercation with Creeve that had left a scar on his neck, and Troomis was planning revenge on the captain.<ref name="RASB" />
